body: “I’ve upgraded you. First class, enjoy your flight.Oh, thank God. Finally, some good news.  I’ve just spent the last forty-eight hours in hell. And the bad weather delayed most flights. “Thank you so much,” I gush.He gives me a wink, and I could just reach over and hug him. But of course I won’t. I’ll pretend that cool things like this happen to me every day.“Thanks again.” I smile.“You have access to the VIP lounge, which is located on level one. Lunch and drinks are on the house in there.
